title: tanacetum parviflorum
intro: Tanacetum parviflorum, also known as small-flowered tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum parviflorum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Tanacetum parviflorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
